name: The Herd
description: '''The Herd''' were an English rock band, founded in 1965. In 1966, 16-year-old [[Peter Frampton]] joined as lead singer and guitarist. The band had three UK top twenty hits in the late 1960s, including "[[From the Underworld]]" and "[[I Don't Want Our Loving to Die]]", before Frampton left in 1968 to form [[Humble Pie (band)|Humble Pie]] with [[Steve Marriott]]. The band broke up shortly after, reforming briefly and unsuccessfully in 1971.
